name: Yorihime | KKHTA
description:
╭━ Requested ✔ ━╮
@Johnnyjoestar

「 ✦ ▰━Judgement━▰ ✦ 」
"Bow down, you filth, and know your place beneath the Moon’s perfection." - Yorihime

Yorihime, along with her older sister Toyohime, was tasked by Lord Tsukuyomi to carry out the Human Instrumentality Project—a ruthless plan to purify Earth and rid it of its impurities. The two sisters also spearheaded the Moonlight Descent Ceremony, a grand scheme to reawaken the Moon and reunite it with Earth, believing it would restore divine order.

✧━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━✧

"...Reisen. You talked too much." - Yorihime
